updates.title: ITR filing 2026: What salaried employees should check in AIS and Form 26AS before submitting returns
updates.summary: As the ITR filing season for 2026-27 begins, salaried employees must review their AIS and Form 26AS for accurate income reporting. The ITR deadline is 31 July 2026, with a belated return option until 31 December 2026.
